nodes.name: Convert HTML to File
nodes.notes: Takes the brochureHtml from webhook body and converts it to a binary HTML file for attachment. For PDF conversion, replace this with an HTML-to-PDF node (e.g., using Gotenberg, wkhtmltopdf, or a cloud PDF API).

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.subject || 'AI & Automation Roadmap — UPG Insurance | Knowlogix' }}
parameters.htmlBody:
=

Hi {{ $json.recipients[0].name.split(' ')[0] }},

{{ $json.senderNote || 'Great meeting today. As promised, here is your personalized AI & automation roadmap — generated live during our conversation.' }}

The attached roadmap was custom-built by AI during our session — tailored specifically to your role and the workflows we discussed. This is exactly the kind of intelligent automation we can bring to UPG Insurance.

Recommended Next Step: A free 2-hour workflow audit with your team. We map where time is being lost and deliver a prioritized AI roadmap — no obligation.

Let us know when works best.

Knowlogix
843-900-4576 | knowlogix.com | info@knowlogix.com
Veteran-Owned · Charleston, SC

nodes.name: Send via Outlook
nodes.notes: SETUP REQUIRED: 1) Add your Microsoft Outlook OAuth2 credentials in n8n Settings > Credentials. 2) Replace the credential ID above. 3) Test with your own email first before sending to clients.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, sentTo: $json.recipients.map(r => r.email), timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
